name: Ayitey Djaba
tagline: Student Of Life || Vim Giver || Software Developer
body:
### It's all about the codes.
Web and mobile is what I do. 

### It's not all about the codes.
A software is a tool not a product. A product is a vision, a product is an attempt to make life better. Products empower people. Products shape the world! 

### In fact, it's all about words.
Only nature is original, we are all just copycats.
Check out my blog at https://medium.com/@brahAyitey
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
